_human_review.notes: Project owner instructed Codex to mark the US Stage B generated/reconciled tests as approved for internal/project benchmarking after manual review on 2026-06-05. This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Proposed acquisition term sheet: Northspire Health Systems, Inc. (a U.S. exchange‑listed healthcare issuer) to acquire Auric River Diagnostics, LLC (private).
Aggregate consideration: $340,000,000, comprised of $220,000,000 cash and $120,000,000 in Northspire Class A common stock valued at signing VWAP; 12.5% post‑closing ownership cap for Auric sellers.
Financing: committed senior secured facility of $180,000,000 from Prosperon Capital Bank, N.A., per commitment letter dated 2026‑09‑12; remaining cash funded from issuer balance sheet.

Closing conditions: absence of a Company MAE; for the avoidance of doubt, general industry reimbursement changes, pandemics, and stock price declines alone shall not constitute a MAC/MAE; HSR equivalent and state health‑care change‑of‑ownership approvals required.
Disclosure controls: selective disclosure prohibitions apply; any analyst interactions limited to a concurrently furnished public deck; no guidance updates prior to embargo lift.
Termination: outside date 2027‑01‑31; $11,500,000 reverse termination fee if financing fails; mutual termination on failure to obtain required health‑agency consents.
A g r e e m e n t a n d P l a n o f M e r g e r
any analyst interactions limited to a concurrently furnished public deck
no guidance updates prior to embargo lift
$25,000,000 contingent earn‑out based on 2027 molecular panel test volumes (>150k units)
